description_long: This is a stylized, boxy van with a dark gray exterior, decorated with colorful, hand-drawn text and graphics. The words 'EPIC GAMER' are prominently displayed in large, multicolored letters across the sides and roof, while the front bears the word 'NINJA' in blue. The rear features a blue panel with '#1 Victory Royale!' written in yellow, referencing gaming culture. The van has simple, cartoon-like wheels and minimal detailing, with blacked-out windows and basic headlight and taillight shapes. The overall design is playful and clearly inspired by gaming themes, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A dark gray, cartoon-style van with colorful 'EPIC GAMER' text and gaming-themed graphics, featuring blacked-out windows and simple wheels.
description_view_0: Left side view showing 'EPIC' in red and 'GAMER' in blue and yellow, with a blue apple graphic and simple wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying two blacked-out rear windows and a blue panel with '#1 Victory Royale!' in yellow.
description_view_2: Right side view with 'GAMER' in large, multicolored letters and a blue apple graphic, similar to the left but mirrored.
description_view_3: Front view showing the word 'NINJA' in blue above the windshield and basic headlight shapes.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
